staged_capture_disclosure: Product screenshots and the video are staged from the real extension's design system and copy. No real ChatGPT account, live conversation, token, or private data is shown. The demo scenarios are invented. The final optimized assets are committed; heavyweight generation tooling is not part of the extension build or trusted computing base.
